# Andrew Schoneweis

> UX Designer at Google, designing Search and AI experiences for YouTube on TV.

Andrew Schoneweis is a UX designer based in Mountain View, California. He has spent the past nine years as a UX designer at Google, working on the YouTube Living Room team creating multi-modal, AI-driven experiences for TVs and home devices.

## Contact

- Email: schoneweis@gmail.com
- Website: https://andrewschoneweis.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/schoneweis
